tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] ([ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch]) x3
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
You were in college working part time waiting tables[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Left a small town, never looked back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I was a flight risk with the fear of fallin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]
Wonderin' why we bother with love if it never lasts[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
I say can you believe it?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
As we're lying on a couch[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
The moment I can see it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]
Yes, yes I can see it now[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Do you remember we were sitting there by the water[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
You put your arm around me for the first time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
You made a rebel of a careless man's careful daughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
You are the best thing that's ever been mine[/tab]

[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Flash forward and we're taking on the world together[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
And there is a drawer of my things and your place[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
You learned my secrets and you figured out why I'm guarded[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
You said we'll never make my parents' mistakes[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
But we've got bills to pay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
We've got nothing figured out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
When it was hard to take yes, yes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
This is what I thought about[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Do you remember we were sitting there by the water[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
You put your arm around me for the first time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
You made a rebel of a careless man's careful daughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
You are the best thing that's ever been mine[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Do you remember all the city lights on the water[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
You saw me start to believe for the first time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
You made a rebel of a careless man's careful daughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
You are the best thing that's ever been mine[/tab]

[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
And I remember that fight 2:30am[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
Cause everything was slipping right out of our hands[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
And I ran out crying and you followed me out into the street[/tab]

[ch]Em7[/ch]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]
Braced myself for the goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Cause that's all I've ever known[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]
And you took me by surprise[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
You said I'll never leave you alone[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
You said I remember how it felt sitting by the water[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
And every time I look at you it's like the first time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
I fell in love with careless man's careful daughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
She is the best thing that's ever been mine[/tab]

[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]


[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
You made a rebel of a careless man's careful daughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
You are the best thing that's ever been mine[/tab]

[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  x3
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]
